name: Salamandamon
description: An Amphibian Digimon that "Armor Evolved" with the " Digimental of Courage ". It is as carefree as it looks with its flame-clad, salamander-like appearance, but once angered, it will cause the flames covering its body to flare up even more and attack. Its Signature Move is spewing out scorching-hot flames from its mouth ( Heat Breath ). Its Special Move is gathering oxygen in the air and triggering a violent explosion ( Backdraft ).
